member.name: M:Skyward.Popcorn.Abstractions.PopcornFactory.Popcorn.EnforceUniqueVisit(System.Object)
member.summary: Track each object we visit to make sure we don't end up in an infinite loop

member.name: M:Skyward.Popcorn.Abstractions.PopcornFactory.Popcorn.AuthorizeValue(System.Object,System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Test if an object is authorized in a given context, from the given source. Source may be an object (if value was from a property) or the collection (if value is contained within it).
member.returns: True if authorized, false if rejected

member.name: M:Skyward.Popcorn.Abstractions.PopcornFactory.Popcorn.GetSourceValue(System.Object,System.String)
member.summary: Retrieve a value to be assigned to a property on the projection. This may mean invoking a translator, retrieving a property, or executing a method.

member.name: T:Skyward.Popcorn.PropertyReference
member.summary: This describes a property to be referenced (by name) and an optional (recursive) list of properties to be referenced on the property's value if it is a complex type.

member.name: P:Skyward.Popcorn.PropertyReference.Children
member.summary: Any properties to reference on this property's value

member.name: M:Skyward.Popcorn.PropertyReference.Parse(System.String)
member.summary: Helper method to take a string in the format "[name[subname1, subname2, ...],...]" and create a PropertyReference tree out of it.

member.name: T:Skyward.Popcorn.IncludeAlways
member.summary: This attribute is used to mark properties to always be included

member.name: T:Skyward.Popcorn.IncludeByDefault
member.summary: This attribute is used to mark properties to be included by default at the main entity level

member.name: T:Skyward.Popcorn.InternalOnly
member.summary: This attribute is used to mark methods, classes, or properties as unable to be passed to any client by Popcorn

member.name: T:Skyward.Popcorn.SubPropertyIncludeByDefault
member.summary: This attribute is used to mark properties of a subordinate entity to be included by default Applying this attribute will overwrite any default includes at the main entity projection level
